spec: AN11(c) real_usable — deployed/servable endpoint + behavioral change vs baseline
principles: LLM judge banned. Only curl HTTP probes + sha256 hashes + Jensen-Shannon divergence (statistical).
substrate: http/curl + sha256 + JSD over response-hash distributions

gate.rule: PASS iff endpoint HTTP 200 on health probe AND JSD(current_hash_dist || baseline_hash_dist) > jsd_min

baseline.rule: If baseline missing OR baseline.verdict == DISCARD OR baseline.hash_dist empty, fall back to synthetic DISCARD baseline (uniform over single-hash — i.e. deterministic stub output)

exit_codes.0: PASS — endpoint healthy AND jsd > threshold
exit_codes.1: FAIL — endpoint unhealthy OR jsd <= threshold (indistinguishable from baseline)
exit_codes.2: INPUT_ERR — endpoint config missing/malformed or prompts file absent

comment.jsd_min: 0.15 chosen empirically: JSD range is [0, ln(2)=0.693] for base-e (or [0,1] for base-2). 0.15 ~= 22% of max — well above noise floor of identical distributions (~0.02) and below full-orthogonality (~0.5). Tightens below 0.1 = behavioral indistinguishability from DISCARD baseline.
comment.single_prompt_index: Only prompt[0] is used for the 50-call core measurement (spec: 'prompt 1종 × 50회'). Full prompt set (10 items) is included for manual extended smoke + future multi-prompt JSD aggregation.
comment.no_llm: Response comparison is sha256 of raw extracted reply field. No semantic judge, no embedding. Purely byte-level distribution.
comment.v8_safe_commit: Additive module. Does NOT modify pass_gate_an11.hexa or existing (a)/(b) verifiers.
